compatibilityLabel: React Test Renderer 19.2.6 create/update/unmount root lifecycle behavior oracle

generation.method: checked runtime inventory plus exact react-test-renderer npm tarballs extracted into a temporary node_modules tree
generation.probeIsolation: one Node child process per react-test-renderer root lifecycle scenario and mode
generation.pathNormalization: temporary extraction roots and local workspace paths are normalized before artifact write

probeModes.reason: Default Node development captures the public root lifecycle, act flushing, deprecation warnings, strict mode render replay, and post-unmount errors.
Default Node production records the production public surface where act is not available and raw root updates remain uncommitted.

captures: create() return own-key order and property descriptors
toJSON, toTree, update, unmount, getInstance, and unstable_flushSync function shapes
raw create() state before any act flush
development empty act flush committing pending root work
production lack of act flush support
create() committed host output under act
update() replacing root output under act
post-unmount .root, getInstance(), update(), and unmount() behavior
getInstance() null result for non-class roots
class component root getInstance() and root TestInstance
getInstance() calling createNodeMock for host roots
React Native test environment deprecation-warning branch
committed output for omitted, false, and true concurrent options

intentionalGaps.reason: This oracle records pinned React Test Renderer package behavior only; Fast React test-renderer facade implementation is owned by separate workers.
The probes use only public react-test-renderer root APIs, public React act, console diagnostics, refs, and serialization outputs.
The oracle records logical post-create/update/unmount states and act boundaries; it does not assert raw task timing.
